name: timeDiff
title: timeDiff
description: Time difference between messages or between a message and the current time in ms (msg2 - msg1 or now - msg1). Starting with CANalyzer 2.xx this difference can be calculated directly (Units of 10 microseconds).

example.code:
diff = timeDiff(m100, now); // CANalyzer 1.x & 2.x
diff = this.time - m100.time; // CANalyzer 2.xx
